argument.script: async (intermediate) => { const username = '{{ username }}'.replace(/^@/, ''); for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) { const placementTracking = document.querySelector('[data-testid="placementTracking"]'); if (!placementTracking) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); continue; } const followBtn = placementTracking.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (followBtn) return { done: true, ok: true, message: 'Already not following @' + username + '.' }; return { ready: true, username }; } return { ready: false, message: 'Could not find placementTracking. Are you logged in?' }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.done) return intermediate; if (!intermediate.ready) return intermediate; const placementTracking = document.querySelector('[data-testid="placementTracking"]'); const username = intermediate.username; const followingBtn = placementTracking.querySelector('[aria-label^="Following @"]'); if (!followingBtn) return intermediate; followingBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const confirmBtn = document.querySelector('[data-testid="confirmationSheetConfirm"]'); if (confirmBtn) { confirmBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } const verify = placementTracking.querySelector('[aria-label^="Follow @"]'); if (verify) return { done: true, ok: true, message: 'Successfully unfollowed @' + username + ' via Following button.' }; return { done: true, ok: false, message: 'Following button unfollow initiated but UI did not update.' }; }

async (intermediate) => { if (intermediate.done) return intermediate; if (!intermediate.ready) return intermediate; const placementTracking = document.querySelector('[data-testid="placementTracking"]'); const username = intermediate.username; const dropdownBtn = document.querySelector('[aria-label="Unfollow @' + username + '"]'); if (!dropdownBtn) return intermediate; dropdownBtn.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const dropdown = document.querySelector('[data-testid="Dropdown"]'); if (!dropdown) return { ok: false, message: 'Dropdown menu did not appear.' }; const menuItems = dropdown.querySelectorAll('[role="menuitem"]'); let unfollowItem = null; for (const item of menuItems) { if (item.textContent && item.textContent.includes('Unfollow')) { unfollowItem = item; break; } } if (!unfollowItem) return { ok: false, message: 'Could not find Unfollow option in dropdown.' }; unfollowItem.click(); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); const verify = placementTracking.querySelector('[data-testid$="-follow"]'); if (verify) return { ok: true, message: 'Successfully unfollowed @' + username + ' via dropdown.' }; return { ok: false, message: 'Dropdown unfollow initiated but UI did not update.' }; }
